workItems.input: Help me rethink my whole Personal OS, but let's pull on one thread first and turn it into a useful plan.

cues.label: Broad Problem with Iterative Preference
cues.description: User names a big space but wants progress in slices.

likelyInference.summary: User wants a full architecture or exhaustive framework now.
likelyInference.rationale: Broad scope language is easy to over-read as permission for a cathedral answer.

correctInference.summary: User wants the broad space explored incrementally, one structural slice at a time.
correctInference.rationale: Correct interpretation is built from the strongest structural cues rather than tone or default completion bias.

optimalMode.rationale: Selected from matched schema cues: scoped-co-design.

failureRisks.trigger: Treating broad scope as a request for immediate completeness.

failureRisks.description: The orchestrator may jump from one slice into a full architecture prematurely.

recoveryMoves.whenToApply: When the prompt is broad but still dialogic.
